projects.name: apache-hamilton
projects.summary: Apache Hamilton (incubating) is a lightweight Python library for directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) of transformations. Your DAG is **portable**; it runs anywhere Python runs, whether it's a script, notebook, Airflow pipeline, FastAPI server, etc. Your DAG is **expressive**; Apache Hamilton has extensive features to define and modify the execution of a DAG (e.g., data validation, experiment tracking, remote execution).
